  • Uses of Enablement in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug with parameters of type Enablement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DebugEnablement.Builder
    DebugEnablement.Builder.defaultEnable(Enablement value)
    Specifies the default debug enablement setting if not overridden per class/method.
    DebugEnablement.Builder
    DebugEnablement.Builder.enable(Enablement enablement, Class<?>... classes)
    Enables or disables debug on the specified classes.
    DebugEnablement.Builder
    DebugEnablement.Builder.enable(Enablement enablement, String... keys)
    Enables or disables debug on the specified classes and/or methods.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Enablement

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger with parameters of type Enablement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CallLogger.Builder
    CallLogger.Builder.enabled(Enablement value)
    Specifies the default logging enablement setting.
    CallLoggerRule.Builder
    CallLoggerRule.Builder.enabled(Enablement value)
    Specifies whether logging is enabled when using this rule.
